rows.description: Annuaragia recipienda a Dno Noris 1772. cont.
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash's description as 'Dno Noris' visually matches the script better than gpt-5-mini's '2do Nov'r', despite gpt-5-mini identifying the ambiguity in its notes. The 'r' in Annuaragia is also visible.
rows.section_header: Annuaragia recipienda a Dno Noris 1772. cont.

rows.notes: Full consensus between extractors and clear visual confirmation.
rows.section_header: Annuaragia recipienda a Dno Noris 1772. cont.

rows.notes: Amounts are consistent between extractors. Adopted gemini-flash's description, as the '---' is clearly visible in the image.
rows.section_header: Annuaragia recipienda a Dno Noris 1772. cont.

rows.notes: Amounts are consistent. Adopted '---' from gemini-flash. Adopted 'Greechhow' from gpt-5-mini as it better reflects the 'ch' ligature in the image compared to 's' from gemini-flash. Gpt-5-mini's note correctly identified ambiguity here.
rows.section_header: Annuaragia recipienda a Dno Noris 1772. cont.

rows.notes: Amounts are consistent. Adopted 'Tretherin' (from gemini-flash) and 'Trien: et dimid:' (from gpt-5-mini). The 'r' in Tretherin is clearer than 'w', and 'Trien: et dimid:' makes better contextual sense ('a third and a half'), with visible strokes aligning to 'Trien:'.
rows.section_header: Annuaragia recipienda a Dno Noris 1772. cont.

rows.notes: Amounts are consistent. Visually, the word appears to be 'Anish' rather than 'Ansh' (gemini-flash) or 'Irish' (gpt-5-mini). The final 's' in 'annos' (gpt-5-mini) is clearly visible. This is a visual override combining elements from both.
rows.section_header: Annuaragia recipienda a Dno Noris 1772. cont.

rows.notes: Full consensus between extractors. Gpt-5-mini correctly observed the line is crossed out, reinforcing the absence of an amount, though both correctly extracted the description and lack of amounts.
rows.section_header: Annuaragia recipienda a Dno Noris 1772. cont.

rows.notes: Amounts are consistent. Adopted gpt-5-mini's description 'Fundt' as the 't' is clearly visible in the image, rather than 'Funds'.
rows.section_header: Annuaragia recipienda a Dno Noris 1772. cont.

rows.description: Sir Gregory Turner 3 yrs 32 to Micl. 1772
rows.notes: Amounts are consistent. Adopted gpt-5-mini's description as '32' and 'Micl.' are more visually accurate than gemini-flash's ' & 2' and 'Mic:'.
rows.section_header: Annuaragia recipienda a Dno Noris 1772. cont.

rows.notes: Amounts are consistent. Combined descriptions: 'supern' (from gpt-5-mini) and 'Capons' (from gpt-5-mini) are more accurate based on visual inspection. Gemini-flash noted 'super' being faint, which aligns with the difficulty in discerning the 'n'.
rows.section_header: Annuaragia recipienda a Dno Noris 1772. cont.

rows.notes: Amounts are consistent. Combined descriptions: 'Thos.' and 'olim' (from gemini-flash) are correct. 'Myrn' and 'Capons' (from gpt-5-mini) are more accurate based on visual inspection, with gpt-5-mini noting the ambiguity of the surname.
rows.section_header: Annuaragia recipienda a Dno Noris 1772. cont.

rows.notes: Amounts are consistent. Adopted gemini-flash's description 'Jesus Coll:' as it appears to be a more accurate reading of the abbreviated text than gpt-5-mini's 'some foll:', which gpt-5-mini correctly noted as ambiguous.
rows.section_header: Annuaragia recipienda a Dno Noris 1772. cont.

rows.notes: Added as a distinct row based on visual inspection, aligning with gpt-5-mini's segmentation. The text 'Summa' is clearly visible above the final total amount line, acting as a header/label. No monetary amounts are present on this specific line.

Amounts are consistent between extractors. Adopted gpt-5-mini's interpretation that there is no description text on this final total line itself, as visually confirmed. The 'Summa' text is on the preceding line.
